title: City Administrative Offices Closed Monday, October 9 for Columbus Day
summary: City of Syracuse administrative offices will close Monday, October 9, 2023 for Columbus Day federal holiday. Trash/recycling collection continues on regular schedule; metered parking is free; Department of Public Works yard waste drop-off site closes; emergency services remain available at 315-448-8360.
processing_notes: Routine holiday closure announcement with minimal operational impact
Author listed as Unknown despite appearing under Mayor's Office News section
No CIO-relevant digital services, IT systems, or data governance implications detected
Contact number provided (315-448-8360) for emergency public works services
